qa_pairs.question: Which feature types include Air Conditioning?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_feature_types.feature_type_code FROM ref_feature_types
JOIN other_available_features ON ref_feature_types.feature_type_code = other_available_features.feature_type_code
WHERE other_available_features.feature_description = 'Air Conditioning.'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref feature types entities having at least one related other available features record (linked on ref_feature_types.feature_type_code = other_available_features.feature_type_code) with feature description equal to 'Air Conditioning.'?

qa_pairs.question: Which feature types include descriptions containing 'Securiyt', such as 'Securiyt, eg Burglar Alarm'?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_feature_types.feature_type_code FROM ref_feature_types
JOIN other_available_features ON ref_feature_types.feature_type_code = other_available_features.feature_type_code
WHERE ref_feature_types.feature_type_name LIKE '%Securiyt%'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref feature types entities with feature type name matching '%Securiyt%', having at least one related other available features record (linked on ref_feature_types.feature_type_code = other_available_features.feature_type_code)?
